remediation.description: Engage ARAI or iCAT for AIS 140 Type Approval certification cycle.
Annual COP testing cadence — engage certifying agency after TAC.
Engage CERT-IN empanelled auditor for backend assessment + remediation cycle.
Procure wildcard SSL + enforce HTTPS; verify with external scan.
Migrate to MapmyIndia or SoI-compliant tile source; verify Survey of India licensing.
Port backend to NIC Cloud; engage NIC empanelment process.
Build VAHAN integration layer using NIC-published APIs; test against sandbox.
Engage AP Police / ERSS team; configure IP + SMS gateway per Gazette clauses (j)(k).
Map existing Fleetronix tracking software to AIS 140 feature checklist; close gaps.
Already in product (4.5 Lakh+ trips tracked); formalise AIS 140 feature-parity documentation.
Extend panic routing to emit dual-destination (ERSS + Fleetronix Control Tower).
Procure/integrate SMS gateway with failover; configure for emergency dispatch.
Already in product (cellular m2m); document SIM lifecycle + KYC path.
Already in product (mobile app); customise for AP operations users.
Already in product (Control Tower); rebrand / customise for AP Transport Dept.
Configure storage tiers to 3mo online / 2yr alerts / 2yr archive per AIS 140.
Add emergency-tagged retention policy to storage tier; confirm 'never delete' flag.
Build multi-stakeholder RBAC layer (RTO / permit-holder / VLT-mfr / testing-agency).
Implement MoRTH Data Sharing API endpoints per AIS 140 spec.
Procure physical MC equipment (video wall, UPS, desktops) — AP-local AV vendor.
Build Govt-style report pack (device install, uptime, alerts, fleet summary).
Stand up AP-dedicated 24x7 helpdesk with Telugu/Hindi/English coverage.
Telugu helpdesk covered by Hyderabad ops staff (native speakers).
Hire and train MC 24x7 operations staff (3 shifts).
Build training curriculum for Transport Dept / RTO officials.
Coordinate with AP Transport Dept on PIU + nodal officer appointment (state obligation).
Engage state PMC or use National PMU (DIMTS) per scheme — commercial decision.
Allocate dedicated 2-year O&M squad within bid commercials.
20.35 Cr project capacity — confirm USSPPL + Fleetronix combined capex/opex plan.
Model milestone-based cashflow against Nirbhaya 80/20 release pattern.
Secure PBG line from bank (3-10% of ~20.35 Cr ~= 60L-2Cr).
Arrange EMD via bank FD or BG per tender requirement.
Limited direct Govt MC reference; lead pitch on Fortune 500 scale + AP ports.
Limited direct PSV reference; reposition cargo telematics as PSV-transferable stack.
No AIS 140 device history today; pairs with TAC remediation above.
Covered — 7,000+ devices deployed.
Already covered — USSPPL Bowenpally + Fleetronix Gachibowli are in Hyderabad; establish AP branch presence (Vijayawada) within 60 days.
